title: Sussex top the table at halfway stage
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Newly promoted Sussex CC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Newly promoted Sussex CC is at the top of the table at the halfway stage of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Newly promoted Sussex CC is at the top of the table at the halfway stage of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The defending champions, Pacaltsdorp, who has suffered two defeats thus far is still in the top three.","html":"The defending champions, Pacaltsdorp, who has suffered two defeats thus far is still in the top three."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay Pioneers are still at the bottom of the log and faces relegation.","html":"Plettenberg Bay Pioneers are still at the bottom of the log and faces relegation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The log positions are:","html":"The log positions are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1. Sussex - 29 points (7 matches)","html":"1. Sussex - 29 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2. Pacaltsdorp United - 25 points (7 matches)","html":"2. Pacaltsdorp United - 25 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3. Union Stars I - 24 points (6 matches)","html":"3. Union Stars I - 24 points (6 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"4. Knysna Cavaliers - 15 points (7 matches)","html":"4. Knysna Cavaliers - 15 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"5. Harlequins Forces - 14 points (7 matches)","html":"5. Harlequins Forces - 14 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"6. George (7 matches) - 13 points (7 matches)","html":"6. George (7 matches) - 13 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"7. Union Stars II - 8 points (6 matches)","html":"7. Union Stars II - 8 points (6 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"8. Plettenberg Bay Pioneers minus 2 points (7 matches)","html":"8. Plettenberg Bay Pioneers minus 2 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers were penalised 2 log points for a slow over-rate against Union Stars.","html":"Plett Pioneers were penalised 2 log points for a slow over-rate against Union Stars."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
